description: Wrap a 32-byte tier key for share-link storage; canonical bytes are TS-shipped XSalsa20-Poly1305 (libsodium crypto_secretbox). Unwrap is byte-exact; wrap is non-deterministic in production.

negativeCases.name: tier-mismatch
mutations: unwrap with expected tier=PREVIEW(2) instead of FULL(3)

serverBoundOutputs.name: wrappedTierKey
serverBoundOutputs.reason: Wrapped tier key is stored on the server alongside the link record.

serverBoundOutputs.name: tier
serverBoundOutputs.reason: Access tier byte is part of the link manifest record.

forbiddenServerOutputs.name: tierKey
forbiddenServerOutputs.reason: Plaintext tier keys must never appear server-side.
